likert_1: Did not apply to me at all
likert_2: Applied to me to some degree, or some of the time
likert_3: Applied to me to a considerable degree, or a good part of time
likert_4: Applied to me very much, or most of the time
question_head: Please read each statement and indicate how much the statement applied to you over the past week. There are no right or wrong answers. Do not spend too much time on any statement.
d1: I found myself getting upset by quite trivial things
d2: I was aware of dryness of my mouth
d3: I couldn't seem to experience any positive feeling at all
d4: I experienced breathing difficulty (eg, excessively rapid breathing, breathlessness in the absence of physical exertion)
d5: I just couldn't seem to get going
d6: I tended to over-react to situations
d7: I had a feeling of shakiness (eg, legs going to give way)
d8: I found it difficult to relax
d9: I found myself in situations that made me so anxious I was most relieved when they ended
d10: I felt that I had nothing to look forward to
d11: I found myself getting upset rather easily
d12: I felt that I was using a lot of nervous energy
d14: I found myself getting impatient when I was delayed in any way (eg, lifts, traffic lights, being kept waiting)
d15: I had a feeling of faintness
d16: I felt that I had lost interest in just about everything
d17: I felt I wasn't worth much as a person
d18: I felt that I was rather touchy
d19: I perspired noticeably (eg, hands sweaty) in the absence of high temperatures or physical exertion
d20: I felt scared without any good reason
d21: I felt that life wasn't worthwhile
d22: I found it hard to wind down
d24: I couldn't seem to get any enjoyment out of the things I did
d25: I was aware of the action of my heart in the absence of physical exertion (eg, sense of heart rate increase, heart missing a beat)
d27: I found that I was very irritable
d28: I felt I was close to panic
d29: I found it hard to calm down after something upset me
d30: I feared that I would be “thrown” by some trivial but unfamiliar task
d31: I was unable to become enthusiastic about anything
d32: I found it difficult to tolerate interruptions to what I was doing
d33: I was in a state of nervous tension
d34: I felt I was pretty worthless
d35: I was intolerant of anything that kept me from getting on with what I was doing
d37: I could see nothing in the future to be hopeful about
d38: I felt that life was meaningless
d40: I was worried about situations in which I might panic and make a fool of myself
d41: I experienced trembling (eg, in the hands)
d42: I found it difficult to work up the initiative to do things
debrief: Thank you for completing this questionnaire.
